headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 22, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros suffered a tough loss to the Cleveland Guardians, who took the game 5-8. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI. Meanwhile, the Cincinnati Reds dominated the Tampa Bay Rays, securing a 12-6 victory. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. The San Francisco Giants placed catcher Daniel Susac on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026. The Houston Astros also placed left fielder Taylor Trammell on the 10-day injured list with a left groin strain.

The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded right-handed pitcher Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Guardians in 5-8 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a tough loss to the Cleveland Guardians, who took the game 5-8. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Reds Rout Rays 12-6**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds dominated the Tampa Bay Rays, securing a 12-6 victory. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Marlins in Thrilling 5-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 win over the Miami Marlins, with Dustin May earning the win after 5.1 innings of work. Nathan Church led the Cardinals' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Brewers Blast Past Tigers 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a convincing 12-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Brice Turang leading the offense with 2 hits, 4 RBIs, and 5 at-bats. Grant Anderson earned the win for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Giants Place C Daniel Susac on Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants catcher Daniel Susac has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.
